summary: This document contains internal strategic notes analyzing the competitive landscape and various clinic management business models, ranging from stand-alone EHRs to complete operational takeovers by private equity-backed firms. It includes brainstorming questions regarding market consolidation and the feasibility of a franchise-like model for medical practices. The content compares US-based competitors like VillageMD and ChenMed against potential strategies for KeepMeCompany.

sniff_test_notes: Content focuses heavily on US healthcare models (VillageMD, ChenMed) rather than UK/NHS context; contains informal internal notes ('Confirm please', 'What I don't understand') indicating draft status.
